warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
The fukui-reactivity task was performed on formaldehyde using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`). The geometry was taken from the user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` file and was not optimized during this calculation. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The software used was PySCF.

The most electrophilic site was found to be the Carbon atom (index 1, 1-based label 2) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.70839.
The most nucleophilic site was found to be the Oxygen atom (index 0, 1-based label 1) with a Fukui f- index of 0.46742.

The calculation converged successfully.
